chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1480 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6210/25 2.For orders on CMA 5796/25 3.For orders on CMA 5797/25 4.For hearing of main case 18-09-2025 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Solangi, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition being fiscal matter and submits that the petitioner will file petition afresh at Principal Seat Karachi. Order accordingly. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed applications is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
